\section{Conclusion}
In this study, we introduced \emph{DynamiCrafter}, an effective framework for animating open-domain images by leveraging pre-trained video diffusion priors with the proposed dual-stream image injection mechanism and dedicated training paradigm. Our experimental results highlight the effectiveness and superiority of our approach compared to existing methods. 
Furthermore, we explored text-based dynamic control for image animation with the constructed dataset. Lastly, we demonstrated the versatility of our framework across various applications and scenarios.
